args.Details: top.score AS `top.score`, top.person1Id AS `top.person1Id`, top.person2Id AS `top.person2Id`
city1, collect({score: score, person1Id: cache[person1.id], person2Id: cache[person2.id]}) AS anon_25

args.Order: city1.name ASC, score DESC, person1.id ASC, person2.id ASC

args.Details: cache[city1.name] AS `city1.name`, cache[person1.id] AS `person1.id`, cache[person2.id] AS `person2.id`

person1, person2, city1, score + CASE
  WHEN m IS NULL THEN $autoint_7
  ELSE $autoint_8
END AS score

person1, person2, city1, score + CASE
  WHEN m IS NULL THEN $autoint_5
  ELSE $autoint_6
END AS score

person1, person2, city1, score + CASE
  WHEN m IS NULL THEN $autoint_3
  ELSE $autoint_4
END AS score

person1, person2, city1, score + CASE
  WHEN c IS NULL THEN $autoint_1
  ELSE $autoint_2
END AS score
NOT anon_1 = anon_3 AND NOT anon_0 = anon_2
